sections.paragraph:
Original: מעיל

Transliteration: me‛ı̂yl

Phonetic: meh-eel'

BDB Definition:

  1. robe
    1. a garment worn over a tunic by men of rank
    2. a long garment worn by David's daughters
    3. a garment of the high priest
    4. (figuratively) of attributes

Origin: from H4603 in the sense of covering

TWOT entry: 1230b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
